notes: v0.15.6 — COSMETICS nav fixed (clicks no longer dump you back to MODULES). Per-class ship rendering in the live preview: BASTION = hex, LANCE = rhombus, CHORUS = rings, SHARD = real texture. Ship moves in a slow orbit and rotates to face its velocity so the trail visibly sits behind it (instead of stacking under as a single blob). LIBRARY hides locked modules by default — new SHOW ALL toggle in the LIBRARY header flips to browse mode. Windows only.
